  • Home

  • For Maintenance Teams
For Maintenance Technicians & Operators

Alerts you can trust. Actions you can plan.

SAM4 doesn't add noise to your day. Every alert is reviewed by a Samotics diagnostics engineer before it reaches you. When an alert arrives, it tells you what's wrong, how urgent it is, and what to do next.

See How It Works View Alert Examples

Less firefighting. More planned work.

SAM4 monitors your rotating assets 24/7 from the motor control cabinet. When a bearing starts degrading, a pump begins cavitating, or an electrical fault develops, the system catches it weeks before failure. You get time to plan the repair, order the parts, and schedule the outage. No emergency call-outs. No weekend shutdowns.

What an alert looks like.

SAM4 detects

The AI identifies an anomaly in the electrical signature of a monitored asset. Could be bearing wear, cavitation, misalignment, or an electrical fault.

Engineer validates

A Samotics diagnostics engineer reviews the detection before any alert reaches you. False positives are filtered out. Only validated findings are delivered.

You act

The alert arrives in your CMMS as a work order. It includes: what's wrong, which asset, severity level, and recommended action. You plan the repair on your schedule.

Installation takes less time than a coffee break.

30 min
per asset
Zero
production downtime
MCC only
no access to asset needed
Read-only
no control system connection

SAM4 hardware connects at the motor control cabinet. Current transformers clamp around existing cables. Voltage taps connect to supply terminals. No modifications to the motor, pump, or driven equipment. No scaffolding. No production shutdown. The asset keeps running throughout.

See the install guide →

A normal Tuesday with SAM4.

07:00
Start shift. SAM4 dashboard shows fleet status. Green across 47 assets. One amber alert on Pump 12.
07:15
Open the alert. Bearing inner race defect developing. Severity: moderate. Recommended action: schedule replacement within 4 weeks.
07:30
Create work order in CMMS. Order bearing. Schedule for next planned outage in 2 weeks.
14:00
Planned replacement completed during scheduled maintenance window. No emergency. No overtime.
That's it. SAM4 caught it. You planned it. The plant kept running.

What SAM4 won't do.

SAM4 is not a replacement for your experience. It doesn't diagnose every fault type. It doesn't eliminate all maintenance. What it does: give you earlier warning on the faults it can detect, so you have more time to make better decisions. You still need to inspect, verify, and use your judgement. SAM4 gives you better data to work with.

See what the alerts look like.

Request a walkthrough of the SAM4 platform. See real alerts, real workflows, and how it connects to your CMMS.

See How It Works Talk to a Reliability Engineer

Monitoring the assets your sensors can't reach.
